name: Datavault AI Inc.
business: Datavault AI Inc. is a technology licensing company with two synergistic platforms: Data Sciences and Acoustic Sciences. Data Sciences offers AI-driven data management and monetization software, while Acoustic Sciences provides data-over-sound, spatial audio, and HD audio technologies. The company licenses its patented technologies to consumer electronics manufacturers and enterprises.

exposures.sentence: Our Data Sciences division is focused on the delivery of cyber-secure, privacy protected data management and monetization technologies, the heart of which are our offerings of artificial intelligence ( AI )-driven agents branded as Data Vault , DataValue , DataScore , and Data Vault Bank .

our patented semiconductor and digital module technologies are currently being deployed by several key customers, including Bang & Olufsen, Harmon Kardon, Klipsch and other leading electronics manufacturers.
Available Networks SanQtum Platform (including SanQtum AI): Serves as the national security-grade zero-trust cybersecurity vault and decentralized, GPU-rich HPC edge network.
SanQtum provides post-quantum encryption (NIST-approved FIPS 203/ML-KEM, 204/ML-DSA, 205/SLH-DSA) quantum key encryption to counter harvest now, decrypt later threats
Growth is targeted in robotics, building on our success with set-top boxes, high end speakers and smart televisions we are working on provisioning our technologies for enterprise use within robotics

NYIAX Platform : Multi-year commercial and intellectual property licensing agreement (following the October 2025 letter of intent to acquire NYIAX), integrating IDE with NYIAX s transparent blockchain-based trading technology built on the Nasdaq Financial Framework.
API Media provides multi-channel engagement solutions, digital media integration, and audience intelligence services to sports venues and enterprise clients.
SanQtum provides ... ultra-low-latency processing across synchronized micro-edge data centers.

International Elements Exchange : Focused on tokenizing and trading rare earth minerals, unmined resources, commodities, and carbon credits (leveraging Sumerian traceability technology for immutable physical-to-digital anchoring).

catalysts.sentence: On January 22, 2026, we completed the acquisition of 100% of the outstanding equity interests of API Media Innovations Inc.
On March 18, 2026, we entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger by and among us, DVLT Merger Sub Inc. and NYIAX, Inc.

catalysts.event: Execution of SanQtum master purchase order agreement
catalysts.sentence: On January 4, 2026, we entered into a Master Purchase Order Agreement with AP Global Holdings LLC (d/b/a Available Infrastructure) in which we agreed to purchase SanQtum infrastructure and cybersecurity services under a services-based delivery model.

catalysts.event: Launch of WiSA E Endeavour Receiver Module
catalysts.sentence: Datavault launched the WiSA E Endeavour Receiver Module in September 2025

catalysts.event: Planned nationwide expansion to 100 U.S. cities
catalysts.sentence: Initial activations in high-density markets such as New York and Philadelphia (Q1 2026) form the foundation for planned nationwide expansion to 100 U.S. cities in 2026.

catalysts.event: Targeted commercial launch of NIL exchange with Sports Illustrated
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we entered into an agreement with Sports Illustrated to explore a potential collaboration for the development of a digital asset exchange focused on unlocking value in athlete name, image, and likeness ( NIL ) rights, memorabilia, and related assets, with targeted commercial launch in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Live activations during Super Bowl LX weekend
catalysts.sentence: Live activations during Super Bowl LX weekend (February 2026) in partnership with NFL Alumni

catalysts.event: Expected launch of Information Data Exchange
catalysts.sentence: Our anticipated Information Data Exchange ( IDE ), which is being built on IBM s watsonx.ai platform, is expected to launch in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Global Web 3.0 blockchain market valued at $6.6 billion in 2024 and projected to reach $353.31 billion by 2035, CAGR 43.6%
tamClaims.sentence: According to Market Research Future, the global Web 3.0 blockchain market was valued at $6.6 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $353.31 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 43.6% from 2025 to 2035.

tamClaims.claim: Broader Web 3.0 market valued at $2.25 billion in 2023, CAGR 49.3% through 2030
tamClaims.sentence: Grand View Research estimates the broader Web 3.0 market at $2.25 billion in 2023 with a projected CAGR of 49.3% through 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Web 3.0 blockchain market to grow from $4.84 billion in 2024 to $135.34 billion by 2033, CAGR 44.8%
tamClaims.sentence: Straits Research forecasts the Web 3.0 blockchain market to grow from $4.84 billion in 2024 to $135.34 billion by 2033 at a CAGR of 44.8%.
